{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Redmoon Hall emissary
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] has emissaries at the [[Underlord]] and [[Overlord]] levels.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Redmoon Hall emissary]] had a broken and bruised arm.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
